nodes.label: AI as formatting and reference tool
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to help format stuff and to check medication types and treatments

nodes.label: AI adherence to professional report style
nodes.grounding_span: there also is a sort of 'style' in which a patient care report is written that AI can't really recreate easily

nodes.label: AI reliability in capturing legal and medical specifics
nodes.grounding_span: there are many specific things that an AI would not know to include (like things that must be included for legal reasons)

nodes.label: Self-contained discrete queries vs. ongoing collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: mostly the questions are self contained; like I said earlier, mostly its just for clarifying questions or checking stuff I have already written, not a back and forth

nodes.label: Professional documentation accuracy and legal compliance
nodes.grounding_span: you have to make it very clear that they refused care after being informed of the risks up to and including death

nodes.label: Efficiency in report writing
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to help format stuff and to check medication types and treatments

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as reference tool
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to help format stuff and to check medication types and treatments

nodes.label: Frustration with AI altering required formatting
nodes.grounding_span: it has in the past made me feel unsatisfied by trying to change my formatting to have proper/smoother grammatical structure when I had a clear structure I was writing with

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI replacing core EMT skills
nodes.grounding_span: I think AI is far from taking over the field of emergency medicine

nodes.label: Conditional openness to future AI use if style matching improves
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like I could potentially see myself using it more if it manages to be able to match the style of my patient care reports

nodes.label: Discrete task decomposition — uses AI for isolated queries rather than extended dialogue
nodes.grounding_span: mostly the questions are self contained; not a back and forth

nodes.label: Domain boundary enforcement — clear separation between AI assistance and core professional writing
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use AI to actually write my patient care reports, just to edit them or give me more information
